title: satureja pavoniana
intro: Satureja pavoniana, also known as the Mexican savory, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and parts of Central America, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja pavoniana include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, relieve headaches and fever, and provide antimicrobial protection against certain infections. The herb can be prepared into teas, infusions, and essential oils for consumption, with some also using it in culinary dishes for its distinctive flavor and aroma.
